intended_use: CerebralGo Plus is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including, but not limited to physicians and medical technicians. The software runs on standard "off-the-sh
intended_use_full: CerebralGo Plus is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including, but not limited to physicians and medical technicians. The software runs on standard "off-the-shelf" hardware and can be used for image viewing and processing. Data and images are acquired through DICOM compliant imaging devices. CerebralGo Plus provides viewing and processing capabilities for imaging datasets acquired with adult's CTA (CT Angiography). CerebralGo Plus is not intended for primary diagnostic use.
target_condition: Large vessel imaging/visualization for head and neck CTA
ground_truth: Reference standard created by 3 US radiologists; when two radiologists conflicted, the third radiologist arbitrated and generated the reference standard
other_metrics: Dice coefficient: 0.942; 95% Hausdorff Distance: 3.692. Subgroup analyses by equipment (Dice 0.924-0.945, HD95 1.328-10.098), gender (Dice 0.941-0.944, HD95 3.682-3.702), and age (Dice 0.940-0.955, HD95 1.000-4.846)
